stemHtml: In the formula to calculate the CG position as a percentage of the mean aerodynamic chord, ((L - LEMAC)/MAC) x 100, what does the 'L' represent?

options.b: The length of the mean aerodynamic chord
options.c: The distance of the mean aerodynamic chord leading edge from the datum
options.d: The distance of the mean aerodynamic chord trailing edge from the datum
